text:
Body of the Sanctioned is the second episode of the Fullmetal Alchemist 2003 anime series.

Synopsis

Ed and Al face the false prophet Cornello, a supposed miracle worker using the science of alchemy for sinister reasons.

Transcript

View the transcript for the English dub of this episode here.

Trivia

This episode is adapted from content in Chapter 2: The Price of Life, Chapter 6: The Right Hand of Destruction, Chapter 21: The Brothers' Secret and Chapter 24: Fullmetal Alchemist.
The equivalent episode in the 2009 anime would be Episode 3: City of Heresy.
In the credits on the Volume 1: The Curse English DVD, under the English cast's "Additional Cast" credits, the voice of Trisha Elric is credited as "Mother" to Lydia Mackay, for some reason not using her actual name. Under the "Original Japanese Credits" section, she is instead credited by her full name as "Trisha Elric" to Yoshino Takamori. The latter is odd as she is the only character who is credited by her full name on the DVDs. Most characters are only credited by their first name (e.g. "Edward", "Alphonse", etc.) or only by their last name ("Havoc", "Hawkeye", etc.)
